app.title: AegisVault
app.subtitle: Modern AES-256-GCM desktop encryption
field.password.placeholder: Password used to derive the encryption key
text.title: Text Encryption / Decryption
text.description: AGV1 stores salt, scrypt parameters and authenticated metadata. Legacy ciphertext is detected during decryption.
text.input.placeholder: Enter plaintext, or paste an AGV1 / legacy ciphertext
file.title: File Encryption / Decryption
file.description: Chunked AES-GCM container for large files. Outputs .agv by default and avoids overwriting files.
file.drop_hint: Drop a file here, or click to browse.
base64.title: Base64 Encode / Decode
base64.description: Base64 is encoding, not encryption. It is useful for transport or debugging and provides no secrecy.
base64.input.placeholder: Enter text to encode or decode
base64.file_hint: Drop or select a file for Base64 conversion. This workflow is separate from encryption.
settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Control language, theme, output behavior and migration-only compatibility features.
settings.ak.note: AK wrappers contain the decryption key. They are only for legacy migration, not secure encryption.
warning.legacy_weak_kdf: Legacy compatibility decryption: the old format derives keys with sha256(password). Re-encrypt with the new format after recovery.
warning.legacy_ak_risk: AK compatibility wrapper contains the key inside the ciphertext. Use it only to migrate old data.
error.title: Operation failed
error.crypto.authentication_failed: Authentication failed: wrong password, corrupted data, or tampering.
error.crypto.protocol_error: The data format is unsupported or corrupted.
error.crypto.invalid_kdf: The file requests unsafe or unsupported key-derivation parameters.
error.crypto.invalid_chunk_size: The file requests an unsafe chunk size.
error.crypto.invalid_chunk: The encrypted file has an invalid chunk record.
error.crypto.trailing_data: The encrypted file has unexpected trailing data.
error.file.not_found: The file does not exist or was moved.
error.file.output_exists: Output file already exists. Change settings or choose another folder.
error.file.output_dir_invalid: The default output folder does not exist or is not available.
error.file.reveal_failed: Could not open the file manager.
error.base64.invalid_text: Input is not valid Base64 text.
error.base64.invalid_data: File is not valid Base64 data.
error.legacy.ak_disabled: AK compatibility parsing is disabled. Enable it in Settings only when migrating old data.
error.legacy.file_too_large: This legacy file is too large for safe compatibility migration. Use a smaller staged migration workflow.
error.resource.limit_exceeded: The input exceeds application safety limits.
error.generic: Unexpected error. Details were written to the log.
about.title: About AegisVault
about.body: AegisVault is a local desktop encryption utility. It uses scrypt + AES-256-GCM, keeps legacy recovery for migration only, and treats AK wrappers as dangerous compatibility material.
drag.text_detected: Text detected and placed into the text input.
drag.file_detected: File detected; switched to the file workspace.
close.running_message: A task is still running. Cancel it and close AegisVault?
